runs.text: This is the process of dental implants

accessibilityData.label: This is the process of dental implants 12 minutes, 42 seconds

runs.text:
This is the process of dental implants

Dental implant surgery is currently a more common procedure. This procedure can help the patient recover a tooth, a group of teeth or all the teeth of a complete dental arch.

It will also allow the restoration of aesthetics and masticatory function.

The surgical procedure can last approximately 30 minutes to more than 1 hour, depending on the number of implants to be placed.

You can follow me on my social networks:
Extraction of teeth with periodontal problem
Bridge on implant made by the laboratory

description.content: Hello, I am Dr. Fora, from Peru, I welcome you to this channel.

accessibilityContext.label: Description. Hello, I am Dr. Fora, from Peru, I welcome you to this chann...tap for more.

title.simpleText: Dr. Abdom Fora

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Dr. Abdom Fora
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Hello, I am Dr. Fora, from Peru, I welcome you to this channel.

This channel is dedicated to all patients who want to know about how different DENTAL treatments are done, we will take care of complex surgeries of wisdom teeth, retained canine, bone regeneration surgery, bone graft, dental implants; topics that other channels do not cover much.

Do not forget to subscribe to this channel, leave your query.
